creator: fnoyanisi@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 166314
stderr for failed epiphany session

Hi,

Installed x11/gnome3 from pkg(8) collection and www/epiphany has also been installed as one of the dependencies. epiphany crashes all the time. I redirected stderr to a file, which is attached, for one of the failed sessions.

Crashes seems to be random, not related to only one web site or number of tabs.

System information:
~ % freebsd-version -k
10.2-RELEASE-p9
~ % freebsd-version -u
10.2-RELEASE-p11
~ % uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd 10.2-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p9 #0: Thu Jan 14 01:32:46 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
~ %
